ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE OR VACATE TRIAL OR TO SEVER

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-03-2007 IN 206, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE OR VACATE TRIAL OR TO SEVER WAS GRANTED. THE CASE IS SEVERED FROM BRAYTON GROUP 393 AND ADDED TO BRAYTON GROUP 406. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/9/07 IS CONTINUED TO 8/6/07 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206, AND THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATE OF 3/23/07 IS CONTINUED TO 7/11/07 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 613. DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT MAY BE HEARD 15 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE WITH 45 DAYS NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D.
